scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w tide-lobster && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p apps/web-ui/tsconfig.app.json && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p apps/web-ui/tsconfig.node.json
scripts.build: npm run build -w tide-lobster && npm run build -w swell-lobster
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w tide-lobster" "npm run dev -w swell-lobster"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n backend,desktop -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w tide-lobster" "npm run dev -w swell-lobster-desktop"
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:pkg -w tide-lobster && npm run prepare:binaries -w swell-lobster-desktop && npm run build -w swell-lobster-desktop
